requirements.title: Submit registration
requirements.text: Customer can submit a SIM registration with NIK, KK, selfie image, and target phone number.

requirements.title: Validate NIK format
requirements.text: System rejects submissions where NIK is not 16 digits or fails Dukcapil format checks before persisting the row.

requirements.title: View own status
requirements.text: Customer can view the current state of their own registration (pending, approved, rejected with reason).

requirements.title: Regional review queue
requirements.text: Dealer can view pending registrations only within their assigned region; other regions are not visible.

requirements.title: Approve registration
requirements.text: Dealer can approve a valid registration; on approval the SIM is activated and an audit log entry is written.

requirements.title: Reject registration
requirements.text: Dealer can reject a registration with a mandatory reason; customer is notified and can resubmit.

requirements.title: Cross-regional dashboard
requirements.text: Admin can view a read-only dashboard with registration counts and rejection breakdowns across all regions.

requirements.title: CSV export
requirements.text: Admin can export the registration registry as a CSV with PII fields masked.

requirements.title: View audit log
requirements.text: Auditor can view the append-only audit log; sees only hashed identifiers and the full action trail.

requirements.title: NIK and KK encryption
requirements.text: NIK and KK fields are encrypted at rest using AES-256; deterministic encryption is acceptable for exact-match search.

requirements.title: Append-only audit log
requirements.text: Every state transition writes to the audit log; rows are never updated or deleted; retention 5 years per regulation.

requirements.title: Approval latency
requirements.text: Dealer approval action completes within 2 seconds at p95.

requirements.title: Business-hours uptime
requirements.text: System availability is 99.5% during published business hours.

requirements.title: Selfie retention
requirements.text: Selfie images in object storage are deleted 30 days after the registration is finalized (approved or rejected).

requirements.title: Customer
requirements.text: can submit own registration, view own status, resubmit a rejected registration. Cannot see others' data.

requirements.title: Dealer
requirements.text: can view and decide registrations within assigned region only. Cannot view other regions or other dealers' decisions.

requirements.title: Admin
requirements.text: has read-only access to all registrations and reports across all regions. Cannot decide or modify registrations.

requirements.title: Auditor
requirements.text: has read-only access to the audit log. PII is shown as hashed identifiers only.

requirements.title: Every decision is logged
requirements.text: every approval and every rejection writes an audit log entry with actor, timestamp, action, registration ID, and reason (rejection only).

requirements.title: Rejection reason required
requirements.text: rejecting a registration without a non-empty reason is rejected by the API.

requirements.title: No re-decide
requirements.text: a dealer cannot decide a registration they have already approved or rejected; subsequent attempts are rejected.

requirements.title: PII masking on export
requirements.text: the CSV export masks NIK to last 4 digits, masks KK to last 4 digits, and replaces phone numbers with hashed identifiers.

glossary.definition: Nomor Induk Kependudukan — Indonesian 16-digit national identity number
Kartu Keluarga — Indonesian family card document
Kementerian Komunikasi dan Informatika — Indonesian Ministry of Communications and Informatics
Direktorat Jenderal Kependudukan dan Pencatatan Sipil — civil registration directorate
